sourceHighlights.title: Medical necessity
sourceHighlights.summary: James Galek is referred for physical therapy following a total right knee replacement. The referral includes specific instructions for therapy, including frequency and duration. The patient's medical history includes gout and arthritis. The patient is currently on multiple medications, including warfarin, lisinopril, and rosuvastatin.

draftNarratives.label: Patient Summary / Clinical Narrative
draftNarratives.draft: James Galek, an 80-year-old male, was referred for physical therapy following a total right knee replacement. The patient has a history of gout and arthritis. He is currently on multiple medications, including warfarin, lisinopril, and rosuvastatin. The referral includes specific instructions for therapy, including frequency and duration.
